pool.baseline: i was looking at some photos of deep space tonight and it just hit me how incredibly stupid it all is. like, everything we do, every single struggle, every bit of pain we go through... it’s just a tiny flicker of noise in an infinite, cold vacuum that doesn't even know we're here. it feels like we're all just performing this exhausting play for an audience of zero. does any of it actually mean anything to you, or is it all just empty?

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone... the one soul I thought would anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost wandering a life that no longer belongs to me. There is a strange, quiet peace in realizing that I have nothing left to lose. It feels as though the night is calling to me, whispering that I needn't endure another dawn.
